summary: This global controls whether or not  AOCV derating factors are applied to the dynamic, SI-induced delay component or not. With a value of '1', the AOCV derating factor will be applied to both the static and dynamic components of the delay arc. When set to '0', the AOCV derate will only apply to the static component of the delay.
